title: Chapter 30
content:
Chapter 30: 10x Rebate

"Well?" she said. "I’m waiting."

Sean moved behind her. Ran his hands over her hips. She pushed back against him.

"No foreplay this time," she said. "I’m still wet from the first time. Just fuck me."

He entered her in one slow motion. She gasped and her hands gripped the sheets.

"Oh god," she breathed. "That angle. That’s..."

He started moving. The position was primal. Deep. He could watch himself disappear inside her and she could feel every inch of him from a new angle. Her back arched and her head dropped forward and she started making sounds that were closer to growls than moans.

"Harder," she said. "Please. Harder."

He gave her harder.

The sound of their bodies filled the apartment. No one would hear. The walls were thick enough. But the sound filled the space between them and made everything more intense.

She came quicker this time. The angle, the pace, the lack of foreplay. It all built fast and when she broke she cried out his name. Not a scream. A plea. Like she was asking him for something only he could give her.

He followed her over the edge. Pulled out just in time and spilled hot across the small of her back. She shivered at the sensation.

They collapsed together. She turned and pulled him into her arms.

"Round three," she murmured into his hair. "Give me five minutes."

"Take your time."

She laughed softly. "I don’t want time. I want you again."

The third time was different.

Gentler. Slower. They faced each other on their sides, her leg hooked over his hip, him sliding into her with a tenderness that surprised them both. No urgency now. Just sensation. Just the quiet intimacy of being joined.

She looked at him the whole time. Didn’t speak. Didn’t need to. Her eyes said everything.

He moved inside her with long, slow strokes. Her breath came in soft rhythm with his movements. The morning sun had shifted and now it fell across the pillow behind her.

"I’m glad you moved into my building and I met you" she whispered.

"I’m glad you brought breakfast."

She smiled. Kissed him. Kept kissing him as her breathing changed and her body tightened and this orgasm was different from the others. Quieter. Deeper. Less about release and more about connection.

She held him inside her when it was over.

"Your turn," she murmured. "One more time for me."

She tightened around him deliberately and that was all it took. He came with his face buried in her neck, her arms around him, her voice in his ear telling him yes and please and there

.

They lay tangled together in the aftermath. The sheets were ruined. The coffee was cold. Neither of them cared.

"I should go," she said eventually. But her arms tightened around him.

"You should stay," said Sean.

She was quiet for a moment. Then she pulled back and looked at him.

"What are we doing?" she said. "You and me. What is this?"

Sean looked at her. At her blue eyes and her dark hair spread across his pillow and the expression on her face that was half hope and half fear.

"What do you want it to be?" he said.

She didn’t answer right away. Then she leaned forward and kissed him softly.

"I don’t know yet," she said. "But I know I don’t want it to stop."

His phone buzzed on the nightstand. The screen lit up.

[Makima — Favorability: 98]

[10x Rebate Threshold: 2 points remaining]

Sean didn’t look at it.

Makima’s fingers traced down his chest. "How long until breakfast?"

"What do you mean?"

She swung her leg over his hips. Straddled him again. He could feel her still wet against his stomach.

"I mean," she said, looking down at him with an expression that was pure want, "how long until you’re ready for round four?"

Sean’s hands found her hips.

"Not long," he said.

She smiled. Leaned down. Her lips brushed his ear.

"Good," she whispered. "Because I’m not done thanking you yet."

Outside the morning was fully bright now. The city moved on. Traffic hummed below and somewhere a phone rang unanswered.

But in the small apartment on the third floor, nothing else existed.

Just the two of them. And whatever came next.

—--------------------------

Sean opened his eyes at six forty-three in the evening.

The room was dim. The afternoon light had faded while they slept. The curtains were half drawn and the city outside had shifted into that in-between hour where the day crowd went home and the night crowd hadn’t fully arrived yet.

He lay still for a moment.

Makima was asleep beside him. Her black hair spread across the pillow. Her breathing slow and even. She was facing away from him with the blanket pulled up around her shoulders. She looked completely at peace. Like every weight she’d been carrying for three months had finally put itself down and gone somewhere else.

Sean watched her for a moment.

Then his phone buzzed on the nightstand.

He reached for it carefully.

[SYSTEM MILESTONE REACHED]

[Makima — Favorability: 100]

[MAXIMUM FAVORABILITY ACHIEVED]

[10x Rebate Multiplier: FULLY ACTIVATED]

[Important: 10x Rebate applies exclusively to spending directly on Makima. Gifts, experiences, care, and purchases made for her personally trigger the 10x return.]

[New Feature Unlocked: Second Bind Slot Now Available]

[You may now bind a second high-beauty target]

Sean stared at the screen.

10x.

Every dollar spent directly on Makima came back ten times. Not double. Not five times. Ten.

He did the math quietly in his head. If he spent a hundred thousand on something for Makima personally, he’d receive a million back. A million spent on her would return ten million.

He almost sat up too fast.

He caught himself. Looked over at Makima still sleeping. Stayed still.

He wanted to test this immediately. But the 10x only worked on spending directly on Makima. Not charities in her name. Not general spending. On her. For her. Personally.

He’d need her awake for that.
